name: post_hoc_grouped_trial_sensitivity
purpose: Sensitivity check for the row-level overlapping-window split used by the frozen embedded parity target.
status: post-hoc offline analysis; not used as the embedded parity target and not replayed on ESP32
interpretation: The grouped-trial result is lower than the row-level benchmark
column13: consistent with the acknowledged risk that overlapping row-level windows inflate the frozen benchmark metrics. The ESP32 validation demonstrates parity with the frozen benchmark implementation
